location.grant_access_body: Tap the button below to share your location and find routes near you.
location.unavailable_body: Walk My Way requires your precise location to calculate personalized walking routes. Please allow location access in your browser and try again.
location.error_not_supported: Your browser does not support geolocation.
location.error_denied: Location permission was denied. Please allow access in your browser settings.
location.error_unavailable: Your position could not be determined. Please check your device settings.
location.error_timeout: Location request timed out. Retrying without high accuracy…
location.error_timeout_final: Location request timed out. Please check your connection and try again.

route.error_server: Unable to connect to the server. Please try again.

autocomplete.no_results: No results found within 15 km of your location.

stops.title: Stops Along the Way
stops.empty_after: to include places along your route.

result.no_stops: No matching stops were found along this route for your selected preferences.

region.unavailable_body: Walk My Way is currently only available in Austria. We’re working on expanding to more regions soon.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.trade_group: Trade group: Services in Automatic Data Processing and Information Technology
imprint.court: Registered at the Commercial Court Vienna
imprint.liability_content_p1: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general law pursuant to § 7 para. 1 TMG. However, pursuant to §§ 8 to 10 TMG, we are not obligated as a service provider to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity.
imprint.liability_content_p2: Obligations to remove or block the use of information under general law remain unaffected. However, liability in this regard is only possible from the time of knowledge of a specific legal violation. Upon becoming aware of such violations, we will remove this content immediately.
imprint.liability_links_p1: Our website contains links to external websites of third parties over whose content we have no influence. Therefore, we cannot assume any liability for these external contents. The respective provider or operator of the linked pages is always responsible for the content of those pages. The linked pages were checked for possible legal violations at the time of linking. Illegal content was not recognisable at the time of linking.
imprint.liability_links_p2: However, permanent monitoring of the content of linked pages is not reasonable without concrete evidence of a legal violation. Upon becoming aware of legal violations, we will remove such links immediately.
imprint.copyright_p1: The content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to copyright law. Reproduction, editing, distribution and any kind of use outside the limits of copyright law require the written consent of the respective author or creator. Downloads and copies of this page are only permitted for private, non-commercial use.
imprint.copyright_p2: Where content on this site was not created by the operator, the copyrights of third parties are respected. In particular, third-party content is identified as such. Should you nevertheless become aware of a copyright infringement, please inform us accordingly. Upon becoming aware of legal violations, we will remove such content immediately.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.license_body: This application is provided under the Apache License 2.0. It is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, without warranties or conditions of any kind, either express or implied. See the Apache License 2.0 for the specific language governing permissions and limitations.
privacy.cloudflare_body: This website is protected by Cloudflare’s DNS proxy service. As a result, website metadata (such as IP addresses and request headers) may be routed through servers located in the United States as part of Cloudflare’s global network infrastructure. This is a standard security and performance measure. For details, please refer to Cloudflare’s Privacy Policy at cloudflare.com.
privacy.tracking_body: This application does not use any tracking technologies, analytics services, or cookies. No personal data is collected, stored, or processed beyond what is technically necessary to serve the application.
privacy.data_body: Route queries submitted through this application (including your location and destination) are used solely to calculate and return your walking route in real time. No route data is stored, logged, or retained on our servers after the response is delivered.
